description: Canonical semantic control schema for vibrotactile generation on top of PCA coefficients.

semantic_controls.description: Controls carrier oscillation density in time. Higher values produce denser oscillations and lower values produce sparser oscillations.
semantic_controls.notes: Frequency can affect how visible envelope modulation appears, but it must only be treated as frequency. PCA range calibrated from Varimax multi-anchor sweep payload.

semantic_controls.description: Controls overall vibration amplitude / energy level. This axis is inverted in PCA space.
semantic_controls.low_end_interpretation: Lower semantic intensity = weaker vibration amplitude.
semantic_controls.high_end_interpretation: Higher semantic intensity = stronger vibration amplitude.
semantic_controls.notes: Critical inverted axis: lower PC2 means higher actual amplitude. PCA range calibrated from Varimax multi-anchor sweep payload.

semantic_controls.description: Controls temporal amplitude modulation. Lower values are steadier and more continuous; higher values are more pulsing, breathing, or swelling.
semantic_controls.semantic_space_direction: higher = more pulsing / more envelope variation
semantic_controls.pca_space_direction: higher = more pulsing / more envelope variation
semantic_controls.notes: Confirmed from direct sweep observation: lower is steadier, higher introduces breathing / swell. PCA range calibrated from Varimax multi-anchor sweep payload.

semantic_controls.description: Controls how vibration energy is grouped or segmented in time.
semantic_controls.notes: Reserved as the canonical temporal grouping axis. PCA range calibrated from Varimax multi-anchor sweep payload.

semantic_controls.description: Controls local transient strength and waveform edge sharpness.
semantic_controls.notes: PCA range calibrated from Varimax multi-anchor sweep payload.

unresolved_pcs.description: Unresolved semantic axis. Keep as TODO placeholder only.
unresolved_pcs.notes: Do not expose as a canonical semantic control.

unresolved_pcs.description: Unresolved semantic axis. Keep as TODO placeholder only.
unresolved_pcs.notes: Do not expose as a canonical semantic control.

unresolved_pcs.description: Unresolved semantic axis. Keep as TODO placeholder only.
unresolved_pcs.notes: Do not expose as a canonical semantic control.

notes: LLM must not output raw PCA coefficients or low-level waveform parameters.
